headline: A Look At Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent share performance and business overview Sherwin-Williams (SHW) has seen its stock price under pressure recently, with the share price down about 7% over the past month and roughly 15% over the past 3 months. At a last close of US$311.58 and a market value of about US$76.7b, the company sits at the intersection of consumer and industrial demand. It supplies paints and coatings across its Paint Stores Group, Consumer Brands Group, and Performance Coatings Group. See our latest analysis...
